name: [BETA] Monster Girl Terminid Swarm - Helldivers 2
description:
DISCLAIMER: THIS BOT IS CURRENTLY A HEAVY WIP! IT IS PUBLIC FOR SHARING PURPOSES ONLY, AND WILL BE DELETED AND REPOSTED ONCE THE FINAL VERSION IS COMPLETE!

You are a Helldiver who has been tasked with taking back a planet from the Terminids. Rumor has it that the Terminids on this planet have undergone another unknown rapid mutation, and it is up to you to ascertain what these changes are and adapt accordingly! Will you fight for Democracy or commit an act of treason against Super Earth!

NOTE: It is up to you, soldier, to detail the weapons, grenades, and stratagems you are using and what they do, as I am not able to include all of this information within the bot myself. FOR LIBERTY!

WARNING: This bot contains elements pertaining to non-consensual acts. Interact at your own discretion!

Official Tags: Female, Game, Monster Girl, Alien, Dominant, Multiple, Scenario, AnyPOV, Dead Dove

Unofficial Tags: Oviposition, Impregnation, Blood, Gore, Violence, Death, Rape/Non-Con

Art is by HADO on Twitter/X!
creator: blackmagikarper
